name: room in the castle
description: I'm in a room in the castle
hints: There is an open window here. Go outside to find the ledge.
GO WINDOW or GO LEDGE to reach the ledge where the voodoo doll is.
Access the ledge outside the window to find the voodoo doll (room 22). SOUTH returns to chapel.

effects:
Message: Bird says: `ask for ADVENTURE 5, -THE COUNT- at your
 favorite computer dealer. It will be LOVE AT FIRST BYTE!`

Message: Bird says: `ask for ADVENTURE 5, -THE COUNT- at your
 favorite computer dealer. It will be LOVE AT FIRST BYTE!`

notes: Room north of the chapel with a window. GO LEDGE leads to room 22 where the voodoo doll is. The bird is an advertisement for Adventure 5. SOUTH returns to chapel.
